name: Check that friend card has username, city, and [Add friend] button on the 'All friends' tab on the Friend page for a user with friends
description: Check if a user card has username, user city, and [Add friend] button
descriptionHtml: Check if a user card has username, user city, and [Add friend] button

steps.name: Logging in the user with email: greencitytest69@hotmail.com
Clicking signin button in the header
Sign in
Navigate to Find Friend page
Check that friends images block exists
Click View all friends link
Select tab: 'find a friend'
Pre-condition: Locate a user with non-empty friends list
Get all friend cards on the Find Friend page
Get all friend cards on the Find Friend page
Click on a Friend card
Click on the All Friends tab
Get all friend cards on the All friends tab on User profile page
Get all friend cards on the Find Friend page
Click on a Friend card
Click on the All Friends tab
Get all friend cards on the All friends tab on User profile page

testStage.description: Check if a user card has username, user city, and [Add friend] button

steps.name: Check if the user card has username
Get all friend cards on the All friends tab on User profile page
Check if the user card has user city
Check if the user card has [Add friend] button
